This report contains all my work done during this part of time. It uses the GAma Modeling Language and the software AutoCAD. This guide is also available in pdf and epub formats. Introduction This report is about an internship which has been realized in autumn 2018 in Madrid at CNP Partners. Its goals were: to model in BPMn major processes of an IT department: incident, change and project. to allow the visualization of interactions between processes in the event of any changes within the company. At the end of the project, teams may be able to improve their estimate of the time and costs of each phase of a project and better monitor the progress of their project. to create clear documentation to them to ensure the proper functioning of each process. What is BPMn? Business Process Model and Notation is a business process modeling method for describing an organization’s value chains and business activities in the form of a graphical representation. It will be used inn order to represent the processes. What is ADONIS NP? ADONIS NP is a Business Process Management (BPM) and Analysis (BPA) tool. It supports business process management based on the BPMS framework created at the University of Vienna. It is the software used for the creation of the processes. What is a RACI matrix? A RACI (responsible, accountable, consulted and informed) matrix shows the reponsabilities of each intervenor inside a process. Two RACI matrix have been done during this internship.

Chapter 1 Processes In order to be more efficient, the IT department of CNP PARTNERS wanted to have 3 major processes in BPMn in order to adopt the same procedure each time it was needed. Those processes are about the incidents, the changes and the project management. They have been done in spanish in order to be easy-to-understand for the IT team. A RACI matrix has been done in order to show who should participate to each step of the incident process. Another one has been done for the project management project. In order to keep confidential the process, I will show you an example that could be used. Below, there is an example of change process. If you don’t know how BPMn works or if you need to remember it, look at the image below. It contains the signification of each symbol used. This process begin with a request of change. First, the resquest is analyze. Is it in contradiction with an old change? If it is, then is the change needed? If it is not, is it an important change? The importance of it will be confirmed by someone else from a comity of development. If the importance is confirmed, then the change will be done. In this example, there is two sub-processes. One for the little change and another one for the important ones. They won’t be described in this report. ADONIS NP allows to add documents that will be need during the process. In the example, there is two documents: the request of changement and analysis of the consequences of the change. It also allows to describe each step of the process and to indicate which category of step it is. The user can add sub-process and who should do the task. It avoid to have a long process, which can be hard to understand. At the end of the internship, 26 processes and sub-processes have been done and the 3 processes have been approached. Two of them were confirmed and will be used in the futur, the incident one and the management project one. The last one needed some modifications that was done later. According to me, the most important thing in these processes is to keep a record of each incident, how it is solved. Indeed, if the same incident append a few years later, the solution will be easy to find. It is the same for the changes. Those records can be put in an Excel file or in a database. It will be better if the code used to solve it is also available with the description of the solution provided for the incident or the change.

Chapter 2 Benchmarking The benchmarking is a method that study and analyze the management technics and organization of other companies. One has been done about incident management in other companies. It contains several companies such as Iliad and Amazon Web Service (AWS). You can find below an extract of this benchmarkingwhich was redacted in Spanish: The idea of having a survey of satisfaction also appeared. It should be use in case of a client reports a bug. In that case, the client can comment how the incident was manage and if the solution provided corresponds to his expectations.

Chapter 3 JIRA JIRA is a tool developed in order to track bugs and issues. It is also used for project management. JIRA is used in the incident process. Below, there is an exemple of how an incident can be manage by using this software. As you can see, in this example, there are 4 steps in the management of incident. They are incident declared, incident analyzed, solving incident and incident solved. A ticket is created for each incident. In this example, the incident is a dysfunction of an application. It is a major incident and it is the fifteenth incident since this process is used. It is also possible to add a description and who should work on it. There is a lot of other features that can be add in a ticket but it will be too long to enumerate them.

Conclusion In order to manage correctly an IT department, it is important to have the same processes for each task in order to find how to improve it. So, it allows the department to be more efficient. This is why the processes about incident, change and project management needed a BPMn representation. In order to know what the processes are in other companies, a benchmarking was needed. This internship allowed me to improve my spanish. Indeed, all the meeting were in spanish. We worked in agile method; It means that there was at least one meeting per week. I learnt how an assurance company works and I discovered the software JIRA. I also had a formation about the software ADONIS NP. I improved my BPMn skill too. So I developed my technical skills as well as my linguistic ones. Those skills will be useful in my futur engineering career. This report is short because the major part of the work is confidential. It was create in order to give an overview of the work done during the internship.

Abstract During this internship, I developed my Spanish as well as my organization skills by working on ADONIS NP and JIRA. I did a benchmarking and 3 processes have been represented by using BPMn. They were about incident, change and project management in the IT department of CNP PARTNERS. Keywords: BPMn, ADONIS NP, JIRA, incident, project management, change, process
